summary: Frontend testing of Tratamiento aplicador+maquina mismatch warning feature. All 6 scenarios PASSED: (1) inline yellow warning appears when tecnico has maquinas_ids and selected maquina is not in the list; (2) window.confirm dialog on submit with correct Spanish message including 'continuar y guardar... de todos modos'; cancel keeps modal open and switches to 'aplicacion' tab; (3) OK on confirm proceeds with save and closes the modal; (4-6) NO warning when match, no warning when tecnico without maquinas_ids, no warning when no maquina selected.

issues: Multiple React hydration warnings logged: 'In HTML, span cannot be a child of select/option/tr/td/tbody/th'. Caused by visual-editor instrumentation wrapping. Non-blocking but noisy in console.

critical_code_review_comments: Tratamientos.js is 1426 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Should be split (e.g., extract TratamientoForm, TratamientoAplicacionTab subcomponents).
The window.confirm message in handleSubmit and the inline warning text are duplicated literals — consider extracting to a helper to keep messages consistent.
Warning logic appears 2x (render + handleSubmit). Extracting a computeAplicadorMismatch(tecnico, maquina_id, tecnicosAplicadores, maquinaria) helper would DRY both call sites.
seed_data_creation: Temporarily created a 'TEST_MAQ_MISMATCH' maquina via POST /api/maquinaria (because seed only had AGRIFAC which is Antonio's assigned maquina, making a mismatch impossible). The test tratamiento created during T3 (accept-OK) and the test maquina were both cleaned up via DELETE API calls after testing completed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tab buttons in TabbedModal use data-testid='tab-{key}' (NOT 'tratamiento-tab-{key}'). For tratamiento form: tabs are tab-general, tab-parcelas, tab-producto, tab-aplicacion. To trigger aplicador+maquina mismatch on this DB you must create an extra Operativo maquina (only AGRIFAC seeded, which is Antonio's only assigned one). Antonio Sanchez (_id 6a27edb2c7c8f845aea00124) has maquinas_ids=['6a3e364d40b2b1b51493e704'] (AGRIFAC). Clemente Torres Martín (_id 6a3e350d40b2b1b51493e703) has empty maquinas_ids.

verification_evidence.warning_text: ⚠️Esta máquina no está asignada al técnico Antonio Sanchez. Puede generar incidencias en una inspección administrativa.
verification_evidence.confirm_dialog_text:
⚠️ Aviso de trazabilidad

La máquina "TEST_MAQ_MISMATCH" NO está asignada al técnico Antonio Sanchez.

Esto puede generar incidencias en una inspección administrativa.

¿Deseas continuar y guardar el tratamiento de todos modos?
